one_time_description: One time inflation relief fund payment
economic_notes: Nation holds investments in Burns Lake Native Development Corporation (62.87%), Fort Babine Lake Property Ltd., Gramma's House Society, Lake Babine Economic Development Society, Lake Babine Nation Forestry LP, Lake Babine Nation Forestry Ltd., Lake Babine Nation Ventures LP, Nedut'een Development Corp., Talok Fisheries LP, Talok Fisheries Ltd., and 1203001 B.C. Ltd. Nation also participates in BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing General Partnership.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to GBEs not having audited financial statements available for year ended March 31, 2023. Eleven GBEs accounted for under modified equity method with total investment of $15,254,150. Prior period restatement of $8,000,000 applied to deferred revenue and accumulated surplus related to Foundation Agreement revenues that should have been deferred. Restated 2022 accumulated surplus is $62,280,739 vs previously stated $70,280,739. Large deferred revenue balance of $40,931,792 includes $30,000,000 from BC FPA Economic Development. ISC funding from Note 14 is $18,230,942 operating only (no capital in 2023). Total government transfers per Note 14 are $28,286,953. OSR calculated as total revenue $50,332,862 minus total government transfers $28,286,953 = $22,045,909.
